title: sphaerostephanos womersleyi
intro: Sphaerostephanos womersleyi is a species of fern in the family Dryniaceae, commonly known as the Womersley's sphaerostephanos or Womersley's fern. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sphaerostephanos womersleyi are said to include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
